testcase.name: test_metrics_error_paths_and_shutdown_resilient
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:28 统一基础设施集成层不可用，使用降级方案: cannot import name 'get_data_adapter' from 'src.core.integration' (unknown location) WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:459 统一基础设施集成层不可用，使用标准logging WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:495 使用降级基础设施服务 WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:516 降级缓存初始化失败: No module named 'src.data.core.cache' INFO data_registry:registry.py:36 DataRegistry initialized INFO disk_cache:disk_cache.py:76 DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: cache INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:245 使用降级缓存管理器 WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:847 StockDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:853 IndexDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:860 NewsDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:867 FinancialDataLoader not available INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:578 核心服务注册完成 INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:269 DataManager initialized successfully INFO disk_cache:disk_cache.py:76 DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: enhanced_cache INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:500 增强版数据集成管理器初始化完成 INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:555 创建数据流: s1 INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:681 关闭增强版数据集成管理器 INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:107 停止实时数据流: s1 WARNING enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:700 关闭线程池失败: tp WARNING enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:708 关闭进程池失败: pp WARNING enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:716 关闭缓存管理器失败: cache INFO enhanced_integration_manager:enhanced_integration_manager.py:743 增强版数据集成管理器已关闭 --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------
testcase.system-err: --------------------------------- Captured Err --------------------------------- WARNING:data_manager:统一基础设施集成层不可用，使用降级方案: cannot import name 'get_data_adapter' from 'src.core.integration' (unknown location) WARNING:data_manager:统一基础设施集成层不可用，使用标准logging WARNING:data_manager:使用降级基础设施服务 WARNING:data_manager:降级缓存初始化失败: No module named 'src.data.core.cache' INFO:data_registry:DataRegistry initialized 2025-11-16 23:06:32,982 - disk_cache - INFO - DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: cache INFO:disk_cache:DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: cache INFO:data_manager:使用降级缓存管理器 WARNING:data_manager:StockDataLoader not available WARNING:data_manager:IndexDataLoader not available WARNING:data_manager:NewsDataLoader not available WARNING:data_manager:FinancialDataLoader not available INFO:data_manager:核心服务注册完成 INFO:data_manager:DataManager initialized successfully 2025-11-16 23:06:33,006 - disk_cache - INFO - DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: enhanced_cache INFO:disk_cache:DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: enhanced_cache INFO:enhanced_integration_manager:增强版数据集成管理器初始化完成 INFO:enhanced_integration_manager:创建数据流: s1 INFO:enhanced_integration_manager:关闭增强版数据集成管理器 INFO:enhanced_integration_manager:停止实时数据流: s1 WARNING:enhanced_integration_manager:关闭线程池失败: tp WARNING:enhanced_integration_manager:关闭进程池失败: pp WARNING:enhanced_integration_manager:关闭缓存管理器失败: cache INFO:enhanced_integration_manager:增强版数据集成管理器已关闭
